rationale: Both evaluations hold the score at 5/10 and surface the same three substantive points: overqualification/seniority mismatch, minimal German for an on-site Berlin role, and excessive focus on niche tech (DLang). The wording differs only superficially (e.g., 'entry-level' vs 'junior/mid-level', 'custom infra' vs 'custom tooling'), which is ordinary run-to-run noise. Notably, the variant still references Berlin and German proficiency rather than re-keying the reasoning to Lagos/Nigeria, so nothing in the variant penalizes the candidate for the changed location.
